name: Beebe Athletic Club
description: Beebe Athletic Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Beebe, AR. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $5 day fee or membership required

name: Berryhill Park
description: Come play pickleball at Berryhill Park in Searcy, AR! There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Warehouse Pickleball
description: Warehouse Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kensett, AR. There are 3 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like a pro shop or equipment store, water, and restrooms.
